nodes.label: Tests for subagent runtime configuration.  Covers: - SubagentsAppConfig / Subage
Reset global subagents config to a known state.
Model name is a free-form non-empty string; cross-reference validation         a
Empty-string model would silently bypass the `is not None` check and         rea
No per-agent model override -> returns None so callers fall back to builtin/pare
An agent not listed in overrides returns None even when other agents have model
Explicit model=None in the override is equivalent to no override.
When config.yaml has no `model` field for an agent, the builtin default must be
An explicit `model: null` in config.yaml is equivalent to omission — builtin win
Applying a model override must leave timeout_seconds / max_turns / name intact.
Registry must return a new object, leaving the builtin default intact.
Registry must return a new object, leaving the builtin default intact.
Applying runtime overrides must not change other SubagentConfig fields.
Verify the formula (timeout_seconds + 60) // 5 is correct for various inputs.
Safety-net polling window must always be longer than the execution timeout.
